SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-02-2010 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JEFFERY, JAMES IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT LING TRUST CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO THE EVIDENCE PRESENTED DID NOT ESTABLISH THAT DEFENDANT HAD PRIOR NOTICE OF THE CONDITION OF THE SIDEWALK; AND THAT EVIDENCE DID NOT ESTABLISH THE INCIDENT CAUSED NTHE PLAINTIFF'S INJURIES. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
